headline: Ridgeline Closes Oversubscribed Fund II
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn. & WASHINGTON, April 30, 2026--Ridgeline Capital Management, LLC ("Ridgeline") announces the oversubscribed final close of Ridgeline Ventures Fund II LP and Ridgeline Ventures Fund II-S L.P. (together, "Fund II") in December 2025 with over $180 million in commitments, inclusive of SBA commitments, and backing from Fortune 500 companies like FedEx and Cisco Investments. Ridgeline Ventures Fund II-S L.P. is part of the first cohort of Small Business Investment Company (SBIC) Licensee

content.title: Ridgeline Closes Oversubscribed Fund II
content.summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn. & WASHINGTON, April 30, 2026--Ridgeline Capital Management, LLC ("Ridgeline") announces the oversubscribed final close of Ridgeline Ventures Fund II LP and Ridgeline Ventures Fund II-S L.P. (together, "Fund II") in December 2025 with over $180 million in commitments, inclusive of SBA commitments, and backing from Fortune 500 companies like FedEx and Cisco Investments. Ridgeline Ventures Fund II-S L.P. is part of the first cohort of Small Business Investment Company (SBIC) Licensee

thumbnail.caption: Ridgeline General Partners (L to R): Andrew McMahon, Ryan Clinton, and Ben Walker.
